introSection: Wilkołak (Polish for Werewolf) is a wooden roller coaster located at Majaland Kownaty. It was manufactured by Great Coasters International, designed by Skyline Attractions, and opened on June 29, 2019. This is the only wooden roller coaster in Poland.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Wilkołak is a mirror image of Heidi The Ride at Plopsaland Belgium, which in turn is a near-clone of White Lightning at Fun Spot America.

fullText:
Wilkołak (Polish for Werewolf) is a wooden roller coaster located at Majaland Kownaty. It was manufactured by Great Coasters International, designed by Skyline Attractions, and opened on June 29, 2019. This is the only wooden roller coaster in Poland.

Wilkołak is a mirror image of Heidi The Ride at Plopsaland Belgium, which in turn is a near-clone of White Lightning at Fun Spot America.
